'''Gulma''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Gulma system/Legends|Gulma system]] in [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]] and was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Gulmarid]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. The planet was covered by [[Swamp/Legends|swampy]] terrain.

==History==
The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] subjugated the peoples of Gulma, shipping the [[Gulmarid]] off as experimental fodder for [[Mir Tork]] and [[Leonis Murthé]]. The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] was stripped of its natural resources, and left to rot as a barren, uninhabitable wasteland. When the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] came to power, it managed to free many Gulmarid from the ''[[Azgoghk]]'', returning them to their [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] - though they soon found Gulma was no longer capable of supporting life. The entire Gulmarid species was brought to extinction until a survivor, [[Slique Brighteyes]], hired [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] to destroy the ''Azgoghk'' in [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]].
